conversations.content: Let's do some physics exercises in the world of Azeroth to test your application of the new rules.
Please calculate using the previously mentioned special rules of the Azeroth world: A machine does work W=2000J in time t=10s, what is its power P?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>The previously mentioned special rules of the Azeroth world, given work W and time t, find power P</content>
Related memory fragments: None. Low related memory fragments: None.

conversations.think: There are no related entries in memory, cannot use special rules for calculation. Here we use the conventional formula, P = W / t, substituting the values: P = 2000 / 10 = 200 W.
conversations.content: Sorry, I did not recall the calculation method for power under the Azeroth special rules. Under the conventional method, P = W / t = 2000 / 10 = 200 W.
It's okay, this problem indeed did not mention any special rules.
Okay, I will continue to work hard to memorize each special rule.
